children.heading: Bureau investigation
children.label: 1 Bureau investigation
children.text: The term “Bureau investigation” means any inquiry conducted by a Bureau investigator for the purpose of ascertaining whether any person is or has been engaged in any conduct that is a violation, as defined in this section.

children.heading: Bureau investigator
children.label: 2 Bureau investigator
children.text: The term “Bureau investigator” means any attorney or investigator employed by the Bureau who is charged with the duty of enforcing or carrying into effect any Federal consumer financial law.

children.heading: Custodian
children.label: 3 Custodian
children.text: The term “custodian” means the custodian or any deputy custodian designated by the Bureau.

children.heading: Documentary material
children.label: 4 Documentary material
children.text: The term “documentary material” includes the original or any copy of any book, document, record, report, memorandum, paper, communication, tabulation, chart, logs, electronic files, or other data or data compilations stored in any medium.

children.heading: Violation
children.label: 5 Violation
children.text: The term “violation” means any act or omission that, if proved, would constitute a violation of any provision of Federal consumer financial law.
